contract_meta.enhancement: Verification-first enforcement with minimal confidence surface
contract_meta.rationale: Establish a minimal verification spine by ensuring generated projects include at least one executable Vitest spec and a consistent test command. Then surface actual run results and a basic advisory signal to increase trust. Keep scope small, non-breaking, and fully evidence-backed.

project.name: UMCA Executor MVP
project.goal: Increase trust by guaranteeing test presence and displaying verifiable run outcomes with minimal, non-intrusive UI changes.
project.scope: Backend enforcement and evidence surfaces; no frontend frameworks; no API changes.
project.work_profile: Small, isolated wins with discovery-first and gated validation
out_of_scope: Adding new dependencies to the root project

execution_model.verification_strategy: Seed tests + enforce presence; run sandbox tests; record telemetry
execution_model.description: Each win begins with discovery artifacts, followed by surgical implementation and validation gates.
execution_model.failure_mode: HALT on validation failure and document in trace

observability.description: Record key events and test results for auditability

tasks.title: Seed minimal Vitest spec and enforce presence
tasks.description: Ensure every generation includes a minimal Vitest spec and a test script. Enforce presence during generation and seed tests in both plan and single-execution paths.
actions: Create discovery note with integration points
Verify existing seed hooks in server.ts (plan + single)
Add/confirm unit tests for seeding utils
Run validations: lint, typecheck, unit, contract:check, sbom
success_criteria: At least one spec seeded into generated outputs

tasks.title: Confidence summary from run results + advisory vuln signal
tasks.description: Surface counts (pass/fail) and a simple advisory vulnerability signal in the outcome card (CI-only advisory, no new deps).
actions: Plumb advisory flag via CI artifact

tasks.title: Documentation of required checks & CI wiring (non-breaking)
tasks.description: Document required checks (lint, typecheck, unit, contract:check, sbom) and verify they run locally. CI enforcement can be handled via repository settings without code changes.

governance_note.for_human: This contract adopts CDI schema and focuses Phase B on minimal verification improvements.
